reviews.review_description: The experience is incredibly immersive and really makes you feel like a real conductor. Catching the rhythm was a bit challenging at first, but it clearly comes down to practice and that makes it even more rewarding. Can’t wait to experience the full version.

reviews.review_title: DLC Theme need to be More FamilyFriendly
reviews.review_description:
Dear [Game Developer/Support Team],

First of all, I want to express our sincere appreciation for Maestro, my family and I absolutely love the game. It is truly a masterpiece, combining fun gameplay with beautiful musical elements. We’ve enjoyed it so much that I purchased all available DLCs without hesitation.

However, I feel compelled to leave a 2-star review, not because of the gameplay or quality, but due to the tone and atmosphere of the DLC content. The environments are overwhelmingly dark and unsettling, featuring skeletons, ghostly imagery, and hellish themes, which have frightened both me and my children.

While we understand the appeal of dramatic and epic storytelling, we believe it is possible to achieve that without resorting to such demonic visuals. Franchises like Game of Thrones, Lord of the Rings, Harry Potter, and even Fantasia manage to be immersive and powerful without being so disturbing, especially for younger audiences.

Unfortunately, the inability to refund the DLC adds to our disappointment. We genuinely want to continue supporting your work and hope future content can consider a more family-friendly approach, something that maintains the epic and beautiful style without the darker imagery.

Please take this feedback into serious consideration. We truly value what you’ve created and hope to continue enjoying it as a family.

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

reviews.review_title: Best demo ever. 4 star due to rap
reviews.review_description:
This is a truly polished demo. Up there with the best. Thank you devs!

My only critique is I was feeling very sophisticated up until they chucked in a random rap song with swearing.

The devs masterfully created a sophisticated atmosphere, but the rap really took it away briefly. 


Don’t feel like you need to appeal to everyone!!!

Even though the game is already released, this demo is the best demo I have ever seen in my life. People criticizing and saying "oH ThIs deMo iS tHe wOrsT I hAVe eVeR sEeN." No, devs, keep doing what you're doing. Eventually, yall will be in the top Meta Quest studios in the world.
Great rhythm game. Great graphics and great songs! It keeps you engaged as you can unlock songs and items every time you perform well. I'm really happy with the purchase!!!!
Great sound, great ambiance and perfect game play. I will definitely buy full game with DLC's.
I like the game but it was over fast, thought there was talk about a full game, think I just did a demo
Its fun

First, I am very new to VR (about 10 days as I write this). Being a composer, and someone who has conducted orchestras a few times (talking school orchestras and bands here), I LOVE this app.  The first time I was told to "look behind me" and the maestro was just...there....as tall as me, staring at me, and then started talking...lol....it was amazing.

As it got going, orchestra members appeared, and then more, and they are like actual strange people who are lots of fun. They don't just sit there, they talk to the maestro, they talk to each other, it's just amazing. I'm going to find the time to actually finish the demo, and then investigate the full version which is apparently now out.

So this game is a demo, It has one song and a tutorial. The tutorial is slow and boring, And one song is a classical song. now, You can find this full game on steam, with all the features they describe, for PCVR, But it is a completely different game. It is nothing like this. 

There is no mention that this is a demo, And there is no mention that The steam version they are describing here here for features is completely out of date, And a completely different game.

developer_response.body:
As you seem to mention, there is no connection between our free experience available only on the App Lab and this game you mention on Steam. 

If you like, join us on Discord to discuss it:
https://discord.com/invite/ztEZPKKCeX

reviews.review_description: I mean it has a great concept in all but the height calibration, the timing is off, and hand tracking doesn’t work at all. So if you are working for a game in progress that bugs a lot, this is perfect.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to see that your experience was disappointing!

Please join us on Discord, and we will find a solution so that you can fully discover the exoerience. 

Hand Tracking issue is always easy to adjust ;)

https://discord.com/invite/ztEZPKKCeX

reviews.review_description: I need this to get more songs and more development ASAP! I love this game so much definitely 10/10 recommended!

We are excited to announce that the full game will be released this summer 2024! Don't hesitate to add it to your wishlist at

Thanks for your support
